mapper.sql: id, event_type, role, exp_amount, daily_limit, daily_limit_strategy, enabled, effective_at, operator, reason, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM growth_rule_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (effective_at IS NULL OR effective_at <= NOW()) ORDER BY event_type, role
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO growth_rule_config (event_type, role, exp_amount, daily_limit, daily_limit_strategy, enabled, effective_at, operator, reason, version) VALUES (#{eventType}, #{role}, #{expAmount}, #{dailyLimit}, #{dailyLimitStrategy}, #{enabled}, #{effectiveAt}, #{operator}, #{reason}, #{version})
mapper.update: UPDATE growth_rule_config SET exp_amount = #{expAmount}, daily_limit = #{dailyLimit}, daily_limit_strategy = #{dailyLimitStrategy}, enabled = #{enabled}, effective_at = #{effectiveAt}, operator = #{operator}, reason = #{reason}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
